steps.description: Navigate to the pricing page to view available service plans.
Select a plan (e.g., Starter or Pro) by clicking 'Get Started'.
User is redirected to the authentication/signup page to create an account before billing.

blockers.detail: Account creation is mandatory to reach the payment UI or complete a purchase.

evidence.notes: The site uses a typical SaaS commerce model where users select a plan and must create an account to proceed to payment and checkout.

result_raw.notes: TinyFish is a commercial SaaS platform. The commerce flow is centered around subscription plans (Product Listing) on the Pricing page. The checkout process begins with account registration.

global_blockers.detail: Most commercial interactions, including billing and payment UI, are behind a login wall.
